words.clue: Central compartment of the thorax between the pleural cavities
Internal ridge at the tracheal bifurcation whose widening suggests pathology
Lymphoid organ in the anterior superior mediastinum replaced by fat in adults
Duct that drains most of the body lymph into the left venous angle
Most common cause of mediastinal widening in India
Nerve that loops under the aortic arch on the left side
Tube that descends behind the trachea from C6 through the diaphragm at T10
Bony landmark at the junction of manubrium and body of sternum
